name: opencode_projection
description: Add-on host profile: project SkillSet artifacts to OpenCode (.opencode/ layout, AGENTS.md inline instruction mode, agent frontmatter conversion, skills reused from the Claude projection). Registers the 'opencode' host through the core host-profile registry. Declares a dependency on the 'claude' host (INV-H5).
author: Masaomi Hatakeyama
